scope: Port provider discovery and readiness checks into AgenC's LLM discovery layer

requiredBehaviors: report built-in provider readiness from AgenC provider registry entries
detect BYOK credentials from provider-specific env vars and configured provider settings
probe local Ollama and OpenAI-compatible model-server endpoints with bounded timeouts
pass configured bearer credentials to key-backed local model-server probes
detect managed-key availability for paid remote-auth subscriptions
validate hosted AgenC routing through AuthBackend model inference and key vending
return both machine-readable readiness entries and table-formatted CLI output
edgeCases: local probes can be skipped for offline JSON checks
remote free subscriptions with missing BYOK keys are unusable with an upgrade hint
managed key vending rejects empty, mismatched, or wrong-session responses
hosted AgenC routing rejects unknown or self-referential inferred providers
localhost OpenAI-compatible providers remain usable when no API key is required
